body:
Day-of coordination checklist

Standard day-of run sheet for Campbell Events weddings.

  • Arrival and vendor load-in times
  • Ceremony cues
  • Reception timeline handoff
title: Day-of coordination checklist

body:
Rain contingency playbook

Backup plan when weather threatens an outdoor ceremony.

  • Tent and indoor backup options
  • Decision deadline with couple
  • Vendor notifications
title: Rain contingency playbook

body:
Client onboarding steps

How Campbell Events onboards a newly booked couple.

  • Welcome call and contract
  • Initial budget and vision
  • Vendor introductions
title: Client onboarding steps

body:
Post-wedding wrap-up checklist

Closing out a wedding after the event day.

  • Final vendor payments
  • Thank-you notes
  • Review and referral request
title: Post-wedding wrap-up checklist

body:
Vendor COI collection process

Collecting certificates of insurance from all vendors before the event.

  • Request COIs at booking
  • Confirm venue requirements
  • File before day-of
title: Vendor COI collection process

body:
Preferred vendor list

Trusted Campbell Events vendors.

  • Marco Pellegrini — catering
  • Tessa Byrne — florals (Byrne and Bloom)
  • Rafael Morales — DJ; Carlos Reyes — photography
title: Preferred vendor list

body:
Wedding budget worksheet

Tracking estimated vs. actual costs per wedding.

  • Catering and bar
  • Florals and rentals
  • Photography and entertainment
title: Wedding budget worksheet

body:
Seating chart guidelines

  • Collect final headcount
  • Group families and friends
  • Confirm head table and accessibility
title: Seating chart guidelines
